messages.content:
You are an agent answering a question using these tools: google_search, get_stock_data, compute, get_weather.
At each step, EITHER issue exactly one more natural-language sub-query to gather missing information, OR give the final answer if you already have enough.
Respond with EXACTLY ONE of the following and nothing else:
  <sub-query>a single self-contained, single-tool question</sub-query>
  <final_answer>your concise final answer</final_answer>

Original question: What is the name of the restaurant in Palo Alto with a Michelin star in 2025?

History so far:
Step 1 sub-query: google_search: Michelin star restaurants in Palo Alto 2025
  Tool: google_search
  Result: [{"title": "List of Michelin-starred restaurants in California - Wikipedia", "link": "https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Michelin-starred_restaurants_in_California", "snippet": "4 days ago - As of the 2025 Michelin Guide, there are 87 restaurants in California that hold a Michelin star. The Michelin Guides have been published by the French tire company Michelin since 1900. They were designed as a guide to tell drivers about eateries they recommended to visit and to subtly sponsor ...", "content": "List of Michelin-starred restaurants in California - Wikipedia Jump to content From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia The French Laundry, a 3 Michelin-starred restaurant in Yountville, California As of the 2025 Michelin Guide , there are 87 restaurants in California that hold a Michelin star. [ 1 ] The Michelin Guides have been published by the French tire company Michelin since 1900. They were designed as a guide to tell drivers about eateries they recommended to visit and to subtly sponsor their tires, by encouraging drivers to use their cars more and therefore need to replace the tires as they wore out. Over time, the stars that were given out started to become more valuable. [ 2 ] M

Your next action:

response: <sub-query>google_search: Palo Alto Michelin star 2025 restaurant name</sub-query>
